text.title: six-core-principles Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for six-core-principles as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: All six principles pass without any explicit evidence quotes from the artefact.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: All-pass outputs without quotes are LLM politeness artefacts; require citations for every passed principle.

failure-mode.description: Invoking "Build Empowered Teams" to justify removing governance or oversight.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Empowerment requires working agreements and decision rights, not absence of process; require an offsetting governance artefact.

failure-mode.description: Using "Quality" as a standalone domain label (PMBoK 6 vocabulary) inside a PMBoK 8 audit.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PMBoK 8 does not have a Quality domain; quality is the Embed Quality principle applied across all domains.
